questionHtml: State the name of one renewable source of energy other than wood.
markschemeHtml:
Any one of:
wind
tidal/wave
hydro-electric
solar
thermal/geothermal
plant oil

Accept “biofuel/biodiesel/«bio»ethanol” but not just “water” or “fuel cells”.

[Max 1 Mark]

meta.title: State the name of one renewable source of energy other than wood.
